name: SAP Asset Management
description: SAP S/4HANA module for managing asset master data, work orders, and maintenance plans.

name: SAP Finance
description: SAP S/4HANA module for financial accounting, controlling, accounts payable, and receivable.

name: SAP Human Resources
description: SAP S/4HANA module for HR administration, payroll, and organisational management.

name: ADMS
description: Advanced Distribution Management System for real-time network monitoring, control, and outage management.

name: Dynamics 365 CRM
description: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Relationship Management system for accounts, billing, and service.

name: Dynamics 365 WMS
description: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Warehouse Management System for inventory and logistics.

name: Azure Data Lake
description: Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage for analytics, reporting, and data science workloads.

name: Azure Integration Bus
description: Azure API Management and Service Bus for application integration and message brokering.

name: Corporate Portal
description: Internal employee portal for self-service HR, procurement requests, and company news.

name: Azure Databricks
description: Azure Databricks analytics platform for data engineering, data science, and machine learning workloads supporting the ERT project.

name: Minus FT
description: AMI head-end system for collecting interval meter data from low-voltage meters, including 15-minute AMI reads and 5-minute power quality measurements (P, Q, I per phase).

name: LV Meter Analytics
description: Databricks-based analytics platform for processing and analysing low-voltage meter data, including load profiling, anomaly detection, and power quality analytics.
